name: Git and worktree integration
rules: Read git state; do not automate branch, worktree, PR, or remote operations in V1.
Claims remain canonical JSON records; git branch/worktree data is advisory context.
Keep CLI, MCP, and dashboard behavior as thin surfaces over shared core logic.
Warnings about overlap should be conservative and explain uncertainty.
notes: Roadmap Phase 6. Covers branch/worktree detection, mapping git context to claims, overlap warnings, and the worktree messaging-scope decision.
